_comment: Synthetic program files (metadata + short content excerpt). FILE-003 is restricted (supplier-confidential) to demonstrate file-level permission trimming.

files.name: QTP-45621B PPAP Qualification Plan rev D.docx
files.summary: The 45621-B PPAP Qualification Plan, revision D. Owned by Elena Cho. Defines the qualification test sequence including the 40-44 HRC hardness acceptance test, dimensional, and environmental. Quality acceptance sign-off is held by Raj Patel.
files.content_excerpt: Section 4.2 Hardness Acceptance: each part shall measure 40-44 HRC core hardness with no material non-conformance. Section 7 Acceptance: qualification is complete only upon Quality sign-off (R. Patel) of all sections.

files.name: 45621-B Supplier Risk Register.xlsx
files.summary: Supplier risk register. Top open risk: Apex Alloys Inconel 718 lot 24-118 non-conforming hardness causing material non-conformance; mitigation is quarantine + conforming replacement lot 24-126 + re-test.
files.content_excerpt: RISK-07 | Apex Alloys | material lot 24-118 out of hardness spec | Sev: High | Status: Open | Mitigation: quarantine, replace with lot 24-126, re-run the hardness acceptance test | Owner: R. Patel.

files.name: Apex Alloys Supplier Agreement (pricing).pdf
files.summary: Confidential commercial agreement with Apex Alloys including unit pricing and penalty clauses. Restricted to program leadership.
files.content_excerpt: [RESTRICTED — commercial terms] Penalty clause 9.3 applies for delivery of non-conforming lots.
